description_long: This filing cabinet features a tall, rectangular black body with a prominent front panel that is accented by a large, translucent purple section displaying stylized card suit symbols and arrows. At the top, three bold, purple geometric shapes resembling Japanese katakana characters serve as decorative signage. The front face includes a small control panel with buttons and a receptacle, possibly for depositing or retrieving items. The sides and back are solid black, with no visible openings or features, emphasizing its sturdy, monolithic construction. The overall design is modern and slightly playful, likely intended to attract attention in a public or semi-public setting. The cabinet appears to be made primarily of metal with some plastic or acrylic components for the signage and front panel.
description: A tall, black filing cabinet with a purple translucent front panel featuring card suit symbols and bold purple signage on top. The design is modern and eye-catching, with a small control panel and receptacle on the front.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet is solid black with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: The front view shows the purple translucent panel with card suit symbols, a control panel, a receptacle, and bold purple signage on top.
description_view_2: The right side is also solid black, mirroring the left side with no visible features.
description_view_3: The back is plain black with the purple signage visible from above, showing no interactive elements.
